rationale: Calibration source is the canary-proxy receipt at bench/out/r3-1-31b-manifest-simfabric-canary-proxy-calibration/receipt.json (sha256 8f6cbbfb0812fec7d061375b2d988440820b93054019973e61ac3c7b5401554c). Per-pattern cycles-per-call were derived from (a) bench/out/csl-real-canary-compile/<kernel>/scratch/sim_stats.json files (8x3 fabric, ~14 simulated tiles, 7 canary kernels covering gather/rms_norm/fused_gemv/lm_head_gemv/attention_decode patterns) and (b) bench/out/r3-1-31b-multi-token-decode/scratch-subprocess/step000/scratch_<kernel>/sim_stats.json files (11x3 fabric, ~17 simulated tiles, 2 additional kernels covering kv_write and sample patterns). 9 samples total. Median bytesPerCycle = 0.00445. Ceilings are set to 1.5x the rung-2 receipt's grandPredictedCycles (207,349,996) and per-phase predictedCycles (prefill=103,966,848, decode=103,383,148) so the rung-8 launch has headroom for actual measurement to exceed the canary-proxy prediction. Replace this calibrationStatus with the sha256 of a real manifest-shape rung-3 dispatch once hardware execution lands (R3-1 / R3-3) and supersedes the canary-proxy calibration.
